entry.title: New: Bill 29, CD1 (2024) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE TO AMEND THE STATE LAND USE DISTRICT CLASSIFICATION FROM AGRICULTURAL DISTRICT TO URBAN DISTRICT (CONDITIONAL DISTRICT BOUNDARY AMENDMENT) FOR PROPERTY SITUATED AT KĪHEI, MAUI, HAWAIʻI, PORTION OF TAX MAP KEY (2) 3-9-001:034"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
